channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.3.2
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.2

  • History action buttons always visible — Download, copy URL, open folder, and delete buttons are now permanently shown on each history row, no hover required
  • Cleaner history rows — Removed the counting timestamp from history items for a less cluttered look
